title: Now Hiring Store Manager at Crossword Bookstores

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Store Manager at Crossword Bookstores
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Store Manager with drive and ambition, Crossword Bookstores in Mysuru is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Crossword Bookstores:
Crossword Bookstores is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in POS Systems

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Crossword Bookstores!
